prompt:
{
  "common": "Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: reusable WeChat lifestyle persona pool, 3:2 landscape. Image 1 is the sole identity reference and decides who the woman is. Image 2 is clothing and mature feminine mood reference only; never copy its face, room, pose, or body proportions. The subject must remain the exact same recognizable 28-year-old adult Asian woman from Image 1: preserve face shape, brown-black eyes, nose, natural lips, jawline, age, skin tone, hairline, and shoulder-length black hair. Photorealistic candid lifestyle photography with real pores, fine skin texture, natural flyaway hair, realistic fabric folds, correct hands, reflections, shadows and perspective. Tasteful mature sensuality through visible shoulders, collarbones, fitted opaque sportswear, short outerwear or elegant day dresses. Keep all clothing secure and appropriate to the activity. No lingerie, underwear styling, transparent fabric, exposed breasts, excessive cleavage, nudity, fetish styling or provocative posing. No other people, no text, no logo, no brand, no watermark. Avoid identity drift, younger or older appearance, plastic skin, beauty filters, studio glamour, influencer posing, distorted fingers, fused teeth, asymmetrical eyes, duplicate objects and impossible architecture.",
  "size": "1536x1024",
  "quality": "high",
  "scenes": [
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-cycling-river-cover","scene":"Sunny riverside cycling path with trees, city skyline and a road bike stopped beside the railing.","outfit":"Navy fitted short-sleeve cycling jersey with the collar zip slightly open, high-waisted black cycling shorts and helmet; secure opaque sportswear.","action":"She straddles the stopped bicycle with one foot on the ground, adjusts the helmet strap with both hands and looks toward the path with an energized smile.","composition":"35mm eye-level three-quarter body shot, bicycle geometry and hands correct, face unobstructed and clearly recognizable.","lighting":"Bright early-morning sunlight, fresh green and blue colors, natural skin highlights."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-cycling-cafe-conflict","scene":"Small roadside coffee stop for cyclists, bicycle leaned safely outside, water marks and a folded route map on the table with no readable text.","outfit":"Coral sleeveless cycling jersey with modest zip neckline, black cycling shorts and a white lightweight windbreaker worn open.","action":"She sits at the outdoor table rubbing one tired calf with one hand while the other turns her phone screen face down, expression frustrated but thoughtful.","composition":"50mm medium shot including face, hands, calf, table and bicycle in the background, candid rest moment.","lighting":"Soft late-morning shade with natural reflected light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-cycling-repair-ending","scene":"Neighborhood bicycle repair corner with a floor pump, clean tools and the same road bike, no signs or brands.","outfit":"Black square-neck fitted athletic top showing collarbones, olive cargo trousers and white sneakers, opaque practical daywear.","action":"She crouches beside the rear wheel using both hands to reconnect a slipped chain, a small streak of grease on one fingertip, satisfied half-smile.","composition":"35mm low eye-level environmental shot, face visible in three-quarter angle, hands, chain and wheel mechanically plausible.","lighting":"Warm afternoon workshop doorway light, documentary realism."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-hiking-trail-cover","scene":"Green mountain trail with stone steps, fern-covered slope and distant ridge under clear weather.","outfit":"Rust-colored fitted sleeveless hiking top with a modest scoop neck, khaki hiking shorts, trail shoes and small daypack.","action":"She pauses on a stone step, one hand holding the backpack strap and the other wiping light sweat from her temple, smiling toward the ridge.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body hiking portrait, trail depth visible, face and hands clear, safe stable stance.","lighting":"Clear morning mountain light with realistic skin texture and soft foliage shadows."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-hiking-rain-conflict","scene":"Simple wooden mountain shelter during a sudden shower, wet backpack, droplets on the railing and a folded rain shell.","outfit":"Deep teal fitted long-sleeve zip base layer opened only at the collar, black hiking leggings and lightweight shell tied at the waist.","action":"She wrings water from the edge of a trail map sleeve with one hand while checking a muddy shoelace with the other, tired but calm.","composition":"50mm medium shot, seated three-quarter view with face, both hands and wet gear visible, no readable map text.","lighting":"Cool overcast rain light with warm wood reflection, realistic damp textures."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-hiking-summit-ending","scene":"Open mountain viewpoint above low clouds with a metal thermos and backpack resting on a rock.","outfit":"White halter-style athletic hiking top with secure high coverage, dark hiking skort over fitted shorts and an open light-gray windbreaker.","action":"She stands beside the rock pouring water from the thermos into its cup, hair lifted by wind, relaxed proud smile toward the landscape.","composition":"35mm wide environmental medium shot, knees-up, face recognizable, hands and thermos correct, generous mountain context.","lighting":"Golden late-afternoon sun with crisp clean air and balanced highlights."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-market-morning-cover","scene":"Lively but empty-framed neighborhood morning market aisle with vegetables, woven basket and water-sprayed produce; no vendors visible.","outfit":"Tomato-red wrap midi dress with a modest V neckline, fitted waist, short sleeves and comfortable flat shoes.","action":"She holds a woven basket at her hip and lifts one tomato to inspect it, collarbones visible, natural curious expression.","composition":"50mm eye-level knees-up candid shot, produce foreground and aisle depth, face and hands clear.","lighting":"Bright diffused market awning light, colorful but natural."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-market-kitchen-conflict","scene":"Lived-in home kitchen with an overfilled vegetable basket, wilted greens, cutting board and grocery receipt turned face down.","outfit":"Black fitted square-neck sleeveless top under a light oatmeal apron, high-waisted cream trousers, opaque fabrics.","action":"She sorts wilted greens from fresh vegetables with both hands, brows slightly furrowed after buying too much.","composition":"35mm medium shot including face, hands, full basket and realistic counter clutter.","lighting":"Soft midday window light with honest food and fabric textures."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-market-dinner-ending","scene":"Small home dining table at dusk with two simple vegetable dishes, one chipped ceramic bowl and a folded shopping bag.","outfit":"Forest-green one-shoulder fine-knit top and ivory straight-leg trousers, one shoulder and collarbones visible, fully opaque.","action":"She sits at the table tasting soup with a spoon, one elbow relaxed near the folded bag, pleased understated smile.","composition":"50mm eye-level medium shot, face, spoon, bowl and dishes clear, intimate domestic setting.","lighting":"Warm pendant light mixed with blue dusk window light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-plants-balcony-cover","scene":"Compact sunlit apartment balcony filled with mixed healthy and struggling potted plants, watering can and soil marks on tiles.","outfit":"Sky-blue halter-neck knit top with secure coverage and high-waisted white wide-leg trousers, shoulders and upper back tastefully visible.","action":"She kneels beside a drooping plant, touches one leaf gently and looks concerned but engaged.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body environmental shot, face, hand and plant clear, balcony feels used rather than staged.","lighting":"Bright soft morning sun filtered through balcony shade."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-plants-repot-conflict","scene":"Balcony worktable covered with potting soil, cracked terracotta pot, root-bound plant and gardening gloves.","outfit":"Terracotta fitted scoop-neck cropped day top meeting high-waisted linen shorts, loose cream cardigan slipping naturally from one shoulder; opaque and non-lingerie.","action":"She supports the root ball with both hands while repotting, a little soil on her forearm, focused expression.","composition":"50mm medium close shot showing face, shoulders, hands, roots and cracked pot with correct anatomy.","lighting":"Neutral afternoon daylight with detailed soil and leaf texture."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-plants-window-ending","scene":"Living-room window one month later with new green shoots, handwritten-looking blank plant tags and a cup on the sill.","outfit":"Off-white off-shoulder soft sweater and dark satin midi skirt, visible collarbones, opaque knit.","action":"She turns the pot toward the light with both hands and leans closer to inspect a new leaf, quiet delighted smile.","composition":"50mm eye-level waist-up shot, profile and hands visible, plant growth prominent, no legible text.","lighting":"Gentle late-afternoon window glow, calm green and neutral palette."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-tailor-street-cover","scene":"Old neighborhood tailoring street with fabric rolls, shop window and a garment bag, no readable storefront text.","outfit":"Navy fitted square-neck wrap blouse and cream midi skirt with a side slit below the knee, elegant opaque daywear.","action":"She walks toward the tailor carrying a green skirt in a transparent garment bag, glancing at the repaired side seam with anticipation.","composition":"50mm knees-up street candid, natural walking posture, face and hands clear, shop context visible.","lighting":"Soft overcast street light with restrained color."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-tailor-fitting-conflict","scene":"Tailor fitting room with full-length mirror, pins, measuring tape and the green skirt temporarily clipped at the waist.","outfit":"Burgundy sleeveless fitted midi dress with a modest square neckline worn while comparing alterations, shoulders and collarbones visible.","action":"She pinches excess fabric at one hip with one hand and checks the mirror with an uncertain expression; accurate single reflection.","composition":"50mm medium mirror shot, only one subject and one correct reflection, hands and pinned fabric clear.","lighting":"Warm neutral fitting-room light without glamour retouching."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-tailor-gallery-ending","scene":"Minimal community gallery corridor with abstract art and polished concrete floor, no readable labels or other people.","outfit":"Black asymmetric one-shoulder fitted midi dress with a tasteful side slit below mid-thigh, opaque evening outerwear.","action":"She walks through the gallery holding a small clutch, one hand briefly smoothing the newly adjusted waist seam, confident natural smile.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body candid shot, natural stride, face and hand clear, no runway posing.","lighting":"Warm gallery spotlights balanced with cool corridor ambient light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-baking-kitchen-cover","scene":"Bright home kitchen prepared for bread baking with flour dust, mixing bowl, butter wrapper folded blank-side up and linen towel.","outfit":"Cream off-shoulder ribbed top under a charcoal waist apron and high-waisted jeans, visible shoulders, opaque fabric.","action":"She kneads dough with both hands, a streak of flour on one cheek, amused concentrated expression.","composition":"35mm medium shot including face, hands, dough and work surface, authentic kitchen mess.","lighting":"Fresh morning window light with detailed flour and dough texture."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-baking-oven-conflict","scene":"Kitchen oven just opened to reveal a visibly collapsed loaf, timer display turned away and used oven mitts on counter.","outfit":"Burgundy square-neck fitted long-sleeve top and dark satin skirt under a light apron, modest neckline and opaque fabrics.","action":"She crouches safely beside the open oven wearing mitts, looking at the collapsed loaf with disbelief and then a reluctant smile.","composition":"50mm medium environmental shot, face, mitts, oven door and loaf physically plausible.","lighting":"Warm oven light mixed with neutral kitchen light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-baking-neighbor-ending","scene":"Apartment hallway beside her door with a covered bread basket, small vase and clean doormat, no other person.","outfit":"Sage-green sleeveless wrap midi dress with secure neckline and fitted waist, shoulders visible, opaque daywear.","action":"She places sliced bread in a basket outside a neighbor's door and adjusts the cloth cover with both hands, satisfied calm expression.","composition":"50mm knees-up candid shot, face, hands and basket clear, lived-in hallway details.","lighting":"Soft golden evening hallway light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-moving-box-cover","scene":"Apartment living room during a move with labeled-looking blank boxes, packing tape and folded blankets, no readable text.","outfit":"White fitted ribbed sleeveless crop top meeting high-waisted olive cargo trousers, open light denim shirt and practical sneakers.","action":"She lifts one medium box correctly close to her body, knees slightly bent, laughing at the clutter.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body action shot, safe lifting posture, face and hands visible, no exaggerated body proportions.","lighting":"Bright moving-day window light with realistic cardboard texture."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-moving-clothes-conflict","scene":"Bedroom floor surrounded by two open suitcases, old clothes, photographs turned face down and donation bags.","outfit":"Black asymmetric fitted long-sleeve top exposing one shoulder and high-waisted blue jeans, opaque casual outerwear.","action":"She sits cross-legged holding an old jacket against herself while deciding whether to keep it, expression conflicted and nostalgic.","composition":"50mm eye-level seated medium shot, face, hands, jacket and sorting piles clear.","lighting":"Quiet late-afternoon side light with soft realistic shadows."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-moving-newhome-ending","scene":"Mostly unpacked new apartment at sunset with one remaining box, floor lamp, two books and a mug on the windowsill.","outfit":"Rust-colored sleeveless knit midi dress with modest scoop neckline and side slit below the knee, shoulders visible, opaque fabric.","action":"She sits on the windowsill opening the last small box, pauses to look over the room with a relieved smile.","composition":"35mm wide environmental medium shot, knees-up, face and hands visible, room still imperfect.","lighting":"Warm sunset entering an otherwise simple room."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-camping-trail-cover","scene":"Pine forest campsite trail with compact backpack, rolled sleeping mat and tent visible at a distance, no other campers.","outfit":"Forest-green fitted hiking tank with secure coverage, black hiking shorts and an open beige sun shirt, practical opaque outdoor layers.","action":"She walks toward camp holding both backpack straps, shoulders strong, smiling after the hike.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body trail portrait, face clearly recognizable, realistic gear and walking posture.","lighting":"Dappled late-afternoon forest light with natural green tones."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-camping-rain-conflict","scene":"Tent entrance during light rain with damp groundsheet, tangled guy line, wet enamel mug and folded blanket.","outfit":"Deep blue fitted long-sleeve zip hiking top open only at the collar, dark leggings and rain shell around the waist.","action":"She kneels under the tent awning untangling the guy line with both hands, wet hair ends and focused frustrated expression.","composition":"50mm medium shot, face, hands, line and tent structure physically correct.","lighting":"Cool rainy daylight softened by the tent awning."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-camping-fire-ending","scene":"Dry campsite at blue hour with a small safe campfire, enamel cup and tent behind, no other people.","outfit":"Burgundy sleeveless rib-knit midi dress layered with an open utility jacket and ankle boots, secure neckline, shoulders visible.","action":"She sits on a folding chair warming both hands near the fire, relaxed laugh and wind-tousled hair.","composition":"35mm medium environmental portrait, fire at safe distance, face and hands clear, no fashion pose.","lighting":"Warm firelight on skin balanced with cool blue-hour forest ambient light."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-coffee-window-cover","scene":"Quiet home coffee corner beside a bright window with grinder, dripper, kettle and used paper filter, no brands.","outfit":"Ivory fitted square-neck knit top and deep green satin midi skirt, collarbones visible, opaque daywear.","action":"She slowly pours hot water from a gooseneck kettle, eyes on the coffee bed, soft concentrated expression.","composition":"50mm waist-up shot, face, both hands, kettle and dripper correct, intimate home detail.","lighting":"Clean diffused morning window light with gentle steam."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-coffee-scale-conflict","scene":"Kitchen counter with digital scale showing abstract unreadable shapes, three failed coffee cups and scattered beans.","outfit":"Black halter-neck fitted knit top with secure high coverage and high-waisted tan trousers, shoulders and collarbones visible.","action":"She tastes one cup, makes a small displeased face and resets the grinder with the other hand.","composition":"35mm medium shot including face, hands, cups, beans and grinder, no readable numbers or text.","lighting":"Neutral midday indoor light, realistic ceramic and coffee textures."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-coffee-share-ending","scene":"Sunlit apartment dining table with two different coffee cups, sliced fruit and an open blank notebook.","outfit":"Deep red off-shoulder knit top and dark tailored skirt, visible shoulders, fully opaque.","action":"She slides one cup across the table toward an unseen empty seat, then tastes her own cup with a pleased surprised smile; no other person visible.","composition":"50mm eye-level medium shot, face, hands and cups clear, warm lived-in setting.","lighting":"Soft late-morning sun with warm wood tones."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-yoga-studio-cover","scene":"Bright neighborhood yoga studio with wooden floor, folded blanket, blocks and large window, no class participants.","outfit":"Dusty-rose one-shoulder fitted yoga top with secure coverage and high-waisted charcoal leggings, opaque sportswear.","action":"She rolls out a yoga mat with both hands while glancing toward the window, relaxed anticipatory smile.","composition":"35mm three-quarter body candid shot, face, hands and mat visible, stable proportions.","lighting":"Soft bright morning studio light with natural skin tone."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-yoga-balance-conflict","scene":"Same studio during a difficult balance practice with blocks placed safely beside the mat.","outfit":"Black fitted scoop-neck athletic top and dark plum leggings with a light wrap tied at the waist, modest opaque sportswear.","action":"She attempts tree pose, wobbles slightly and reaches one hand toward a block without falling, determined amused expression.","composition":"35mm full three-quarter body action shot, supporting foot and limbs anatomically correct, face recognizable.","lighting":"Clear side window light showing honest effort and fabric texture."},
    {"slug":"20260720-pool-yoga-rest-ending","scene":"Quiet studio corner after practice with folded mat, water bottle and sunlight pattern on the floor.","outfit":"Lavender sleeveless high-neck fitted yoga top and high-waisted navy leggings, shoulders visible, secure opaque sportswear.","action":"She sits against the wall with knees bent, one hand resting on her abdomen and the other holding water, eyes gently closed with a real post-exercise flush.","composition":"50mm seated medium portrait, face and hands clear, unposed recovery moment.","lighting":"Warm late-morning sunlight and soft room shadows."}
  ]
}
